title: calamintha intermedia
intro: Calamintha intermedia, commonly known as lesser calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. The medicinal properties of Calamintha intermedia lie in its essential oils, which contain compounds such as camphor and borneol, that exhibit analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamintha intermedia include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems such as colds and bronchitis. Calamintha intermedia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in aromatherapy blends due to its invigorating and refreshing scent.
